input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.2.1
            TITLE: all electric vehicles must run with the energy meter provided by the organizer

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.2.1: All Electric Vehicles must run with the Energy Meter provided by the organizer
EV.3.2.1 All Electric Vehicles must run with the Energy Meter provided by the organizer 
Refer to the FSAEOnline Website AD.2.2 for detail information on the Energy Meter

final_answer: All Electric Vehicles must run with the Energy Meter provided by the organizer EV.3.2.1 All Electric Vehicles must run with the Energy Meter provided by the organizer Refer to the FSAEOnline Website AD.2.2 for detail information on the Energy Meter
